sections.paragraph:
- Original: Γάζα

- Transliteration: Gaza

- Phonetic: gad'-zah

- Definition: Gaza = "the fortified; the strong"

1. one of the five chief cities of the Philistines in Palestine

- Origin: of hebrew origin H5804

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H5804]; Gazah (that is Azzah) a place in Palestine: - Gaza.
